package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_listen_non_tls: `http.ListenAndServe` (non-TLS) usage in production-like code (not test files, not localhost bindings)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario720Positive(handler http.Handler) error {
	return http.ListenAndServe(":8080", handler)
}
